pr-evidence/repository-secret-scan-guard.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review returned no blocking findings. A residual suggestion to add positive regex coverage was addressed by adding representative credential-shape tests, and follow-up review returned no blocking findings.
verification: GPT-5.5 follow-up review after adding positive regex coverage
what_changed: Added a repository text-file iterator that skips generated and tooling directories.
Added credential-pattern regexes for Databricks PATs, GitHub PATs, LangSmith tokens, OpenAI API keys, and PEM private-key headers.
Added a governance test that fails with path and line information when committed text matches a credential pattern.
Added representative positive tests for each credential-pattern regex without embedding contiguous real-looking secrets in the source file.
pr-evidence/repository-secret-scan-guard.why: The package should not accidentally ship benchmark credentials, workspace tokens, or private-key material in source, documentation, workflows, or PR evidence.
